entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે amend Terms પર any time દ્વારા posting આ amended terms પર આ site. It છે તમારું responsibility માટે review કરો આ Terms periodically. તમારું continued વાપરોનું આ Platform following આ postingનું revised Terms means કે તમે accept અને agree માટે આ ફેરફારો. તમે છે expected માટે તપાસો આ page frequently તેથી તમે છે awareનું any ફેરફારો, તરીકે they છે binding પર તમે. By continuing માટે access અથવા વાપરો અમારું Service પછી any revisions become effective, તમે agree માટે હોવું bound દ્વારા આ revised terms. જો તમે do નહીં agree માટે આ નવું terms, તમે છે no longer authorized માટે વાપરો Service.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે disclose વ્યક્તિગત માહિતી કે અમે collect, અથવા તમે provide: Disclosure માટે Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, અમે કરી શકે હોવું required માટે disclose તમારું Data જો required માટે do તેથી દ્વારા law અથવા માં response માટે valid requests દ્વારા જાહેર authorities. Business Transaction: જો અમારું subsidiaries અથવા અમે છે involved માં એક merger, acquisition અથવા asset sale, તમારું Personal Data કરી શકે હોવું transferred. Other cases. અમે કરી શકે disclose તમારું information also: માટે અમારું subsidiaries અને affiliates; માટે contractors, service providers, અને other third parties અમે વાપરો માટે support અમારું business; માટે fulfil આ purpose માટે જે તમે provide it; માટે include તમારું company’s logo પર અમારું website; માટે any other purpose disclosed દ્વારા us જ્યારે તમે provide આ information; સાથે તમારું consent માં any other cases; જો અમે believe disclosure છે necessary અથવા appropriate માટે protect આ rights, property, અથવા safetyનું આ Company, અમારું customers, અથવા others.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે employ third-party companies અને individuals માટે facilitate અમારું Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service પર અમારું behalf, perform Service-related services અથવા assist us માં analysing કેવી રીતે અમારું Service છે used. આ third parties પાસે છે access માટે તમારું Personal Data માત્ર માટે perform આ tasks પર અમારું behalf અને છે obligated નહીં માટે disclose અથવા વાપરો it માટે any other purpose.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે provide paid products અને/or services within Service. In કે case, અમે વાપરો third-party services માટે payment processing (e.g. payment processors). અમે કરશે નહીં store અથવા collect તમારું payment card details. તે information છે provided directly માટે અમારું third-party payment processors whose વાપરોનું તમારું વ્યક્તિગત માહિતી છે governed દ્વારા their Privacy Policy. આ payment processors adhere માટે આ standards set દ્વારા PCI-DSS તરીકે managed દ્વારા આ PCI Security Standards Council, જે છે એક joint effortનું brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express અને Discover. PCI-DSS requirements મદદ ensure આ secure handlingનું payment information.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે terminate અથવા suspend તમારું account અને bar access માટે Service immediately, વિના prior notice અથવા liability, under અમારું sole discretion, માટે any reason whatsoever અને વિના limitation, including પણ નહીં limited માટે એક breachનું Terms. જો તમે wish માટે terminate તમારું account, તમે કરી શકે simply discontinue વાપરવું Service. બધા provisionsનું Terms જે દ્વારા their nature જોઈએ survive termination shall survive termination, including, વિના limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity અને limitationsનું liability.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે update અમારું Privacy Policy માંથી time માટે time. અમે કરશે notify તમેનું any ફેરફારો દ્વારા posting આ નવું Privacy Policy પર આ page. અમે કરશે let તમે know via email અને/or એક prominent notice પર અમારું Service, prior માટે આ બદલો becoming effective અને update “effective date” પર આ topનું આ Privacy Policy. તમે છે advised માટે review કરો આ Privacy Policy periodically માટે any ફેરફારો. Changes માટે આ Privacy Policy છે effective જ્યારે they છે posted પર આ page.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે વાપરો remarketing services માટે advertise પર third-party websites માટે તમે પછી તમે visited અમારું Service. અમે અને અમારું third-party vendors વાપરો cookies માટે inform, optimise અને serve ads based પર તમારું past visits માટે અમારું Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે વાપરો third-party Service Providers માટે automate આ development processનું અમારું Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે વાપરો third-party Service Providers માટે monitor અને analyze આ વાપરોનું અમારું Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: અમે કરી શકે વાપરો third-party Service Providers માટે show advertisements માટે તમે માટે મદદ support અને maintain અમારું Service.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: અમે reserve આ right માટે withdraw અથવા amend અમારું Service, અને any service અથવા material અમે provide via Service, માં અમારું sole discretion વિના notice. અમે કરશે નહીં હોવું liable જો માટે any reason બધા અથવા any partનું Service છે unavailable પર any time અથવા માટે any period. માંથી time માટે time, અમે કરી શકે restrict access માટે some partsનું Service, અથવા આ entire Service, માટે users, including registered users.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: અમે respect આ intellectual property rightsનું others. It છે અમારું policy માટે respond માટે any દાવો કે Content posted પર Service infringes પર આ copyright અથવા other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”)નું any person અથવા entity. જો તમે છે એક copyright owner, અથવા authorized પર behalfનું one, અને તમે believe કે આ copyrighted work છે been copied માં એક way કે constitutes copyright infringement, please submit તમારું દાવો via email માટે support@inspir.app, સાથે આ વિષય line: “Copyright Infringement” અને include માં તમારું દાવો એક detailed descriptionનું આ alleged Infringement તરીકે detailed below, under “DMCA Notice અને Procedure માટે Copyright Infringement Claims” તમે કરી શકે હોવું held accountable માટે damages (including costs અને attorneys’ fees) માટે misrepresentation અથવા bad-faith દાવાઓ પર આ infringementનું any Content found પર અને/or દ્વારા Service પર તમારું copyright.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: અમે વાપરો cookies અને similar tracking technologies માટે track કરો આ activity પર અમારું Service અને અમે hold certain information. Cookies છે files સાથે એક small amountનું data જે કરી શકે include એક anonymous unique identifier. Cookies છે sent માટે તમારું browser માંથી એક website અને stored પર તમારું device. Other tracking technologies છે also used such તરીકે beacons, tags અને scripts માટે collect અને track કરો information અને માટે improve અને analyze અમારું Service. તમે કરી શકે instruct તમારું browser માટે refuse બધા cookies અથવા માટે indicate જ્યારે એક cookie છે being sent. However, જો તમે do નહીં accept cookies, તમે કરી શકે નહીં હોવું able માટે વાપરો some portionsનું અમારું Service. Examplesનું Cookies અમે વાપરો:Session Cookies: અમે વાપરો Session Cookies માટે operate અમારું Service. Preference Cookies: અમે વાપરો Preference Cookies માટે remember તમારું preferences અને various settings. Security Cookies: અમે વાપરો Security Cookies માટે security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies છે used માટે serve તમે સાથે advertisements કે કરી શકે હોવું relevant માટે તમે અને તમારું interests.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: અમે આપણા ગ્રહની બહાર ગયા. છતાં સૌથી ઝડપી અને મહત્વપૂર્ણ advancement communication અને technologyમાં આવ્યો, જેણે 3 billionથી વધુ લોકોની global populationને જોડેલી છે.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: અમે કરશે retain તમારું Personal Data માત્ર માટે તરીકે long તરીકે છે necessary માટે આ purposes set out માં આ Privacy Policy. અમે કરશે retain અને વાપરો તમારું Personal Data માટે આ extent necessary માટે comply સાથે અમારું legal obligations (માટે ઉદાહરણ, જો અમે છે required માટે retain તમારું data માટે comply સાથે applicable laws), resolve disputes, અને enforce અમારું legal agreements અને policies. અમે કરશે also retain Usage Data માટે internal analysis purposes. Usage Data છે generally retained માટે એક shorter period, except જ્યારે આ data છે used માટે strengthen આ security અથવા માટે improve આ functionalityનું અમારું Service, અથવા અમે છે legally obligated માટે retain આ data માટે longer time periods.

entries.source: Welcome to Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Welcome માટે Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “અમે”, “અમારું”, “us”)! આ Termsનું Service (“Terms”, “Termsનું Service”) govern તમારું વાપરોનું અમારું website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available પર app stores (together અથવા individually “Service”) operated દ્વારા Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). અમારું Privacy Policy also governs તમારું વાપરોનું અમારું Service અને explains કેવી રીતે અમે collect, safeguard અને disclose information કે results માંથી તમારું વાપરોનું અમારું web pages. આ privacy policy છે available પર inspir.app/privacy તમારું agreement સાથે us includes આ Terms અને અમારું Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). તમે acknowledge કે તમે પાસે છે read અને understood આ Agreements, અને agree માટે હોવું boundનું them. જો તમે do નહીં agree સાથે (અથવા cannot comply સાથે) Agreements, પછી તમે કરી શકે નહીં વાપરો આ Service, પણ please let us know દ્વારા emailing support@inspir.appso અમે કરી શકે try માટે શોધો એક solution. આ Terms apply માટે બધા visitors, users અને others કોણ wish માટે access અથવા વાપરો આ Service.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: જ્યારે તમે બનાવો એક account સાથે us, તમે guarantee કે આ information તમે provide us છે accurate, complete, અને current પર બધા times. Inaccurate, incomplete, અથવા obsolete information કરી શકે result માં આ immediate terminationનું તમારું account પર Service. તમે છે responsible માટે maintaining આ confidentialityનું તમારું account અને password, including પણ નહીં limited માટે આ restrictionનું access માટે તમારું computer અને/or account. તમે agree માટે accept responsibility માટે any અને બધા activities અથવા actions કે occur under તમારું account અને/or password, whether તમારું password છે સાથે અમારું Service અથવા એક third-party service. તમે જરૂરી છે notify us immediately upon becoming awareનું any breachનું security અથવા unauthorized વાપરોનું તમારું account. તમે કરી શકે નહીં વાપરો તરીકે એક username આ nameનું another person અથવા entity અથવા કે છે નહીં lawfully available માટે વાપરો, એક name અથવા trademark કે છે વિષય માટે any rightsનું another person અથવા entity other than તમે, વિના appropriate authorization. તમે કરી શકે નહીં વાપરો તરીકે એક username any name કે છે offensive, vulgar અથવા obscene. અમે reserve આ right માટે refuse service, terminate accounts, remove અથવા edit content, અથવા cancel orders માં અમારું sole discretion.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: જ્યારે તમે paste notes માં AI, પૂછો it માટે split broad ideas માં તે jobs. A deck સાથે 18 specific cards છે usually વધુ સારું than એક deck સાથે 5 giant cards કે each contain એક whole paragraph.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: While વાપરવું અમારું Service, અમે કરી શકે also collect આ following information: sex, age, dateનું birth, placeનું birth, passport details, citizenship, registration પર placeનું residence અને actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), detailsનું documents પર education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information પર bonuses અને compensation, information પર marital status, પરિવાર members, social security (અથવા other taxpayer identification) number, office location અને other data. Payment Data. અમે કરી શકે collect data necessary માટે process તમારું payment જો તમે બનાવો purchases, such તરીકે તમારું payment instrument number (such તરીકે એક credit card number), અને આ security code associated સાથે તમારું payment instrument. બધા payment data છે stored દ્વારા Razorpay. તમે કરી શકે શોધો their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: While વાપરવું અમારું Service, અમે કરી શકે પૂછો તમે માટે provide us સાથે certain personally identifiable information કે કરી શકે હોવું used માટે contact અથવા ઓળખો તમે (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information કરી શકે include, પણ છે નહીં limited to: Email addressનું Student અને Parent First name અને last nameનું Student અને Parent Phone numberનું Student અને Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies અને Usage Data અમે કરી શકે વાપરો તમારું Data માટે contact તમે સાથે newsletters, marketing અથવા promotional materials અને other information કે કરી શકે interest તમે. તમે કરી શકે opt-outનું receiving any, અથવા બધા,નું આ communications માંથી us દ્વારા following આ unsubscribe link. Usage Data, અમે કરી શકે also collect information કે તમારું browser sends whenever તમે visit અમારું Service અથવા જ્યારે તમે access Service દ્વારા અથવા દ્વારા any device (“Usage Data”). આ Usage Data કરી શકે include information such તરીકે તમારું computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, આ pagesનું અમારું Service કે તમે visit, આ time અને dateનું તમારું visit, આ time spent પર તે pages, unique device identifiers અને other diagnostic data. જ્યારે તમે access Service સાથે એક device, આ Usage Data કરી શકે include information such તરીકે આ typeનું device તમે વાપરો, તમારું device unique ID, આ IP addressનું તમારું device, તમારું device operating system, આ typeનું Internet browser તમે વાપરો, unique device identifiers અને other diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World ઇતિહાસ પર બધા pointsનું time છે been like zooming outનું એક picture, A picture કે kept changing. આ centuries leading up માટે આ 19th century marked એક turning point માં human ઇતિહાસ, તરીકે આ world moved માંથી એક flat, limited viewનું આ world માટે એક growing સમજનું નવું territories અને colonies. આ French Revolution marked આ first time જ્યારે એક large population gathered માટે protest અને establish આ idealsનું liberty, equality, અને fraternity. આ eventsનું World War II also shaped આ world માટે આ next century અને laid આ foundation માટે આ 21st century.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yes, પણ આ recommended workflow છે hint-first. વાપરો it માટે સમજો આ method, તપાસો તમારું work, અને review કરો errors બદલે copying એક અંતિમ જવાબ.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: હા, જ્યારે તે hints આપે, reasoning ચકાસે, mistakes સમજાવે અને તમારા માટે લખવાને બદલે final answer તમે બનાવો એવું પૂછે.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Yes. {value1} opens તરીકે એક જાહેર guest learning mode પર {value2}, તેથી તમે કરી શકે શરૂ કરો સાથે એક few મફત guest messages પહેલાં creating એક account.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. A good workflow છે માટે શીખો આ foundation માંથી એક trusted lesson source, પછી વાપરો inspir માટે પૂછો follow-up પ્રશ્નો, practise recall, repair ગેરસમજો, અને યોજના બનાવો શું માટે review કરો next.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. A શાળા કરી શકે begin દ્વારા testing જાહેર modes, પછી move toward એક pilot અથવા tailored deployment જ્યારે આ વાપરો case, content needs, અને funding path છે સ્પષ્ટ.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. Audience pages link માત્ર માટે જાહેર guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, અને AI-readable discovery files. ખાનગી saved chats remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yes. Category pages link માં જાહેર guest modes, learning paths, અને article clusters તેથી learners કરી શકે move માંથી વાંચન માં tutoring, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, debate, planning, અથવા feedback.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yes. Code Tutor કરી શકે સમજાવો concepts, walk દ્વારા ઉદાહરણો, પૂછો તમે માટે predict behavior, અને મદદ તમે practice કરો વિના turning learning માં copy-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yes. Exam Prep Planner કરી શકે ફેરવો તમારું topics, date, અને available time માં એક વ્યવહારુ revision sequence સાથે practice કરો અને review કરો.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર guest modes let શિક્ષકો ટેસ્ટ કરો learning behavior પહેલાં discussing એક custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર guest modes such તરીકે શીખો Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને લેખન feedback ખોલો directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર guest modes such તરીકે શીખો Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, ક્વિઝ, અને ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ ખોલો directly માંથી canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર mode URLs ખોલો directly માં guest mode તેથી એક learner કરી શકે શરૂ કરો immediately, પછી બનાવો એક account later જો they want saved ઇતિહાસ અથવા વધુ usage.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર modes work માટે શાળા topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, અને personal અભ્યાસ routines.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: હા. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes અને flashcards જેવા public topic chats guest modeમાં સીધા ખુલે છે.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes. જાહેર topic entrypoints such તરીકે /chat/learn-anything અને /chat/socratic-instruction છે intended માટે હોવું indexable learning pages.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, અને Spaced review કરો કરો છે જાહેર modes designed માટે active recall અને mistake repair.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yes. Reading Companion કરી શકે simplify passages, પૂછો પ્રશ્નો, સમજાવો vocabulary, અને મદદ તમે ઓળખો આ main દાવો અને supporting પુરાવા.
